name: 3 Shelf Narrow Metal Storage Cart White - Brightroom™
description:
Organize shampoo bottles, detergents and other everyday essentials in sleek style with the 3 Shelf Narrow Storage Cart from Brightroom™. This white cart features three narrow shelves to provide enough space for a variety of items. Designed with rolling wheels and side handles, it allows easy movement from one place to another.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
